_comment: v3 bounded-autonomy budget config (§5.1) — CONSERVATIVE placeholders; ground them from measured shifts. loop-state.mjs/budget-stop.mjs read this file FRESH at every Stop (config-wins rule: edit it mid-run and it applies at the next Stop; a per-shift --extend-budget/--budget-iters override beats it). Missing/unreadable/unparseable falls back to the same values baked into loop-state.mjs DEFAULT_CONFIG. The v2 flat shape (top-level max_iterations etc.) is still accepted and maps onto shift.*.
_shift_comment: Per-shift ceilings, v2 semantics carried: max_wall_clock_sec is compared against ACCUMULATED ACTIVE seconds, not calendar time — each Stop adds min(now - last heartbeat, idle_gap_cap_sec), so a long idle pause (milestone review, overnight) costs at most the cap. A prior real run hit 209% of its 6h ceiling with zero effect because ~13h of that was idle; the cap is why that can't happen again. max_iterations is the hard runaway floor regardless of time accounting.
_run_comment: Cumulative ceilings across the whole run (all shifts). 0 = unlimited. When one is exhausted: budget-stop posts the run-scope wind-down and --start-shift refuses until a human runs --extend-budget run.<key>=<value> (logged with operator) or --complete-run. GOAL.md success criteria remain the real terminus.
_milestone_comment: gate_block_max: after N consecutive milestone-gate blocks with no valid token, the block switches to the headless wind-down instruction and the following Stop is allowed — an unattended gated shift converges to a clean HANDOFF instead of looping. approval_ttl_hours: an --approve token expires after this many hours (expired tokens are never consumed — the gate re-blocks); 0 disables expiry.
_session_comment: lease_stale_sec: a shift lease not renewed for this long is considered abandoned (crash) and a new session may take it over. stale_after_sec: session pointer files under .runtime/sessions/ older than this are swept at session boot / --doctor --repair.
_ledger_comment: At shift end, when ledger/events.jsonl exceeds this many lines it is moved to ledger/archive/ and reseeded with one ledger_rotated genesis event whose carried snapshot keeps replay and --shifts history archive-free.
_routines_comment: The /routine menu ONLY (§4.5). No hook reads this key — the deterministic seams (handoff-on-winddown, SessionEnd checkpoint, budget stop) are hooks, so a typo here can never break enforcement. /routine <name> executes the steps in order and finishes with loop-state --log-routine <name>.
